hero.headline: Claims Assistance
hero.subline: Filing a claim can be stressful. We're here to guide you through every step of the process.

steps.title: Contact Us First
steps.description: Call or email us before contacting your insurance carrier directly. We'll advise on the best approach for your situation.

steps.title: Document Everything
steps.description: We'll help you gather the right documentation — photos, police reports, medical records — to support your claim.

steps.title: File Your Claim
steps.description: We file on your behalf or guide you through the carrier's claims process to ensure nothing is missed.

steps.title: Follow Up
steps.description: We monitor your claim and advocate for a fair and timely resolution.

contact.headline: Start Your Claim
contact.note: For life-threatening emergencies, always call 911 first.
